steps.title: Identify the research aim
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize the aim of Nakahara's research. The notes say Nakahara wondered whether some unaccounted-for lunar oxygen could be coming from Earth and analyzed Kaguya data to test that suspicion.

steps.title: Separate aim from method
steps.content: A focuses on Kaguya collecting data, which is a method. B describes Nakahara's earlier curiosity, not the study's aim. D gives the conclusion, not the purpose. The aim was to determine whether some of the Moon's oxygen came from Earth. The answer is C.
